message:
fix(identity,tui,guard,storage): harden identity resolution, TUI snapshot resilience, health check verification, and archive consistency

Identity resolution with path reporting:
- New resolve_identity_with_path() returns Option<(String, PathBuf)>
  to report the actual file path that produced the identity match
- resolve_pane_identity now reflects reality (e.g., legacy
  /tmp/agent-mail-name.* fallback) instead of always reporting
  canonical path
- Fix key mismatch: write_identity_current_pane passes human_key
  instead of raw project_key

Startup health-check hardening:
- is_agent_mail_health_check() now reads response headers and verifies
  x-agent-mail-health signature header — previously any HTTP server on
  the port would pass
- stream.shutdown() moved outside closure to always run

TUI poller snapshot resilience:
- Detect when fresh DB snapshot returns empty detail lists while summary
  counts are nonzero, carry forward previous snapshot's rows with warning
- New must_refresh_for_detail_gap triggers full snapshot refresh
  bypassing data-version short-circuit
- Fix ORDER BY: CAST(timestamp AS INTEGER) DESC instead of bare column
  sort (fixes text vs numeric comparison)

TUI dashboard search performance:
- New fields_match_query_terms() checks fields independently instead of
  allocating concatenated string per row — prevents false matches from
  query terms spanning field boundaries
- format_sample_with_overflow() now generic over AsRef<str>

Tool metrics screen stabilization:
- Selection preserved by tool name across re-sorts (was index-based)
- Error counting fix: no longer treats result_preview containing "error"
  as tool failure — authoritative error count from runtime metrics only
- Hydration preserves live-observed latency histograms when call counts
  unchanged (prevents lossy approximation overwrite)
- Hydration runs every tick when pending (was every 20th)

Guard glob regex fix:
- glob_to_regex uses corrected pattern for bash-style {a,b} brace
  expansion — old pattern failed to match non-double-escaped braces

Storage archive consistency:
- Compare against timestamp+subject_slug instead of just ISO prefix
- Prevents false-positive matches for messages created in the same second
  with different subjects

Server path safety:
- safe_component() treats "." and ".." as empty to prevent path traversal

Messaging fixes:
- InboxMessage.bcc field gets #[serde(default)] so missing bcc key
  deserializes to empty Vec instead of failing

Reservation path handling:
- relativize_path() expands tilde on both path and project root before
  normalization — fixes ~/projects/foo/bar.rs failing to relativize

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -570,7 +570,7 @@ def glob_to_regex(pattern):
     # Restore ** as .*
     regex = regex.replace("\0", ".*")
     # Handle {{a,b}} bash-style brace expansion
-    regex = re.sub(r"\\{{([^}}]+)\\}}", lambda m: "(" + m.group(1).replace(",", "|") + ")", regex)
+    regex = re.sub(r"\\?\{{(.+?)\\?\}}", lambda m: "(" + m.group(1).replace("\\", "").replace(",", "|") + ")", regex)
     return regex
 
 def glob_match(path, pattern):
